name: SchemeDiscounts
description: Customer is asking about a specific Virgin Media discount scheme — such as staff, student, NHS, or armed forces discounts. They may want to apply for a discount, check eligibility, claim a discount that hasn't been applied, or query a named discount that has expired or disappeared. This is not about general price negotiations or promotional deals.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Am I eligible for a {discountType} discount?
I want to claim my {discountType} discount
How do I apply for the {discountType} discount?
I'm a {discountType} worker — do I get a discount?
My {discountType} discount hasn't been applied to my account
I was told I could get a {discountType} discount but it's not on my bill
When does my {discountType} discount expire?
My {discountType} discount has disappeared from my account
I used to have a {discountType} discount but it's been removed
Can I get the {discountType} discount added to my account?
How do I prove I'm eligible for the {discountType} discount?
I've just joined the {discountType} — can I get a discount?
What discount do I get as a {discountType} ?
My {discountType} discount was supposed to last twelve months but it's ended early
I need to renew my {discountType} discount — it's about to expire
Can you check if my {discountType} discount is still active?
